authorization_phrase: Authorize s21-d1 broader-universe weekly relative-strength rotation Tier-N spec DRAFT only — bound by DR10 v2 + walk-forward K13.
clean_generalization_no_selection_bias: Unlike s20 (whose union included the known-OOS-good s18 basket), the s21 basket has 0/48 names ever backtested under this mechanic -> a positive result is genuine independent generalization. Honest residual: names pre-committed in the RUN_BOOK (dd69414) by liquidity/sector-spread/listing-history, never by performance; no look-ahead.

da_register_proposed_byte_equivalent_exc.DA2_mechanic_family: F-xmom: cross-sectional relative-strength rotation, long-only, WEEKLY (IDENTICAL to s18/s19/s20)
da_register_proposed_byte_equivalent_exc.DA9_ranking_selection_rule: each WEEKLY rebalance rank 48 by (L-S)=126-21 trailing total return; SELECT top-M
da_register_proposed_byte_equivalent_exc.byte_equivalence_note: ALL strategy params byte-identical to s18/s19/s20. ONLY DA1 (id), DA14/DA16 (fresh provenance), DA17 (fresh 48-name) differ.

dr_precedence_chain: DR7 -> DR1 -> DR9 -> DR10 -> DR6 -> DR4 -> DR2 -> DR3 -> DR5
edge_not_inherited: The fresh-basket EDGE is NOT assumed or inherited from s18/s19/s20. It is re-proven from scratch at s21 P6 IS (K1 sharpe_proxy>0 AND K2 expectancy>0), P6.7 K13 (>=3/5 + aggregate + K9), and P10 OOS (DR4). A null/negative result is accepted and informative (the weekly RS edge is partly universe-specific).

preseal_k9_turnover_measurement.method: signal-only rotation count (126-21 rank over 48 fresh names -> top-8 -> count names leaving top-8 as closed trades); NO cash/equity/returns/P&L; reused FROZEN s20 parameterized primitives unmodified; SHA256-verified all 48 CSVs against the committed s21 DR9 result; calendar aligned 1759 bars
preseal_k9_turnover_measurement.note_on_oos_turnover_measurement: OOS TURNOVER counted signal-only (calendar/ranking-structural) to test OOS-K9 reachability up front (LESSON_S20_D1_003). NO OOS P&L/returns computed or inspected; the EDGE remains untested until P10. Cannot be tuned-to (params byte-locked; nothing changed based on the count).

purpose: T1 CLEAN GENERALIZATION TEST -- resolves the s20 selection caveat. s20 OOS_CONFIRMED on the s18+s19 UNION (which included the known-OOS-good s18 basket -> sample-size demo, not clean generalization). s21 runs the IDENTICAL byte-locked mechanic (M=8) on a FRESH 48-name universe, ZERO overlap with s17/s18/s19, so a positive result is genuine independent generalization. This DRAFT MEASURES OOS-K9 reachability on the fresh names signal-only BEFORE sealing.

DR10_v2.note: binding at P6.5; broader-breadth turnover raises cost_drag but stays well under 5% (s20 precedent)

K13_per_fold.note: per-fold sample sufficiency for per-fold-OR-aggregate K9; sign-persistence (>=3/5) re-measured with P&L at P6.7

OOS_K9.interpretation: OOS-K9 reachability GENERALIZES to a FRESH universe: 171 (85.8/y) clears the >=50/y floor by +35.8/y (signal-only) -- even higher turnover than the s20 union. Binding confirmation with P&L at P10.
OOS_K9.vs_prior: s18=117/58.7y CLEARED; s19=87/43.6y FAILED; s20 union=134/67.2y CLEARED; s21 fresh=171/85.8y

rec1_equivalent_oos_k9_disclosure: REC1-equivalent (BINDING): OOS K9 >=50/y. Pre-SEAL OOS turnover MEASURED 171 (85.8/y) clears; TRUE OOS K9 (with P&L) confirmed only at P10; the chain shall NOT relax K9.
stop_before_seal_rule: If K9 aggregate, OOS K9, OR K13 per-fold sample sufficiency FAILS at this DRAFT measurement -> HALT after DRAFT commit; do NOT SEAL. (All three PASS here -> eligible to SEAL.)
title: s21-d1 broader-universe (fresh 48-name) weekly RS rotation Tier-N spec DRAFT (carries MEASURED pre-SEAL K9 turnover signal-only no-P&L; reachability ALL PASS; CLEAN generalization test; edge untested; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE)
